title: LAKI Sample Review Row
description: Schema for a fake, public-safe review row example. Do not use private or sensitive data.

id.description: Public-safe identifier for the review row.

domain.description: Broad topic domain such as general, education, health, agriculture, finance_fake_example, or OCR_test.

source_reference.description: Safe citation, public URL, or fake source note. Do not include private source material.

input_text.description: Candidate text. For this public repo, use fake safe examples only.

normalized_text.description: Reviewed or normalized text, if available.

reviewer_note.description: Public-safe note about wording, source, uncertainty, or correction.
